name: Artur
description: Artur (Artur Hilaj), known professionally as Artur or Artur DB, is an Albanian rapper, singer, and songwriter from Kukës, Albania. He started his music career around 2020–2021 and is known for hip‑hop/rap tracks such as "Policia", "Miliona", and "Pa Refren". His music blends rap and melodic elements and has gained traction across the Albanian‑speaking music scene.
